summary: Completed testing of iteration 7 features: Category filter dropdown, individual product exclusion from tracking, and free-first scraping strategy. All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Login with credentials arigastro / Arigastro2026!
GET /api/price-tracking returns tracked_categories_list with 600 Seri and 900 Seri
GET /api/price-tracking?category=600-seri returns only 600 Seri products (27 products)
GET /api/price-tracking?category=900-seri returns only 900 Seri products (110 products)
GET /api/price-tracking (no category) returns all products (137 products) - 'Tum Kategoriler'
GET /api/price-tracking?filter_type=excluded returns excluded products (initially empty)
PUT /api/products/{slug}/exclude-tracking toggles excluded_from_tracking to True
Excluded product appears in filter_type=excluded list
Excluded product does NOT appear in normal (all) list
PUT /api/products/{slug}/exclude-tracking called twice re-includes product (toggle)
PUT /api/products/invalid-slug/exclude-tracking returns 404
filter_type=matched returns only matched products
filter_type=unmatched returns only unmatched products
filter_type=cheaper returns products where competitor is cheaper
filter_type=expensive returns products where we are cheaper
akakce_request function uses curl_cffi direct (FREE) as first method
akakce_request falls back to httpx (FREE) if curl_cffi unavailable
akakce_request uses ScraperAPI (PAID) only as last resort fallback
search_akakce_via_google tries free Google search first
search_akakce_via_google uses ScraperAPI SERP as paid fallback
UI: Category filter dropdown shows 'Tum Kategoriler', '600 Seri', '900 Seri'
UI: Selecting 600-seri filters to 27 products
UI: Selecting 900-seri filters to 110 products
UI: Selecting 'Tum Kategoriler' shows all 137 products
UI: 'Takip Disi' tab exists and shows 'Takip disi urun yok' when empty
UI: Eye icon (EyeOff) on product row - clicking excludes product with toast notification
UI: Excluded product appears in 'Takip Disi' tab
UI: Eye icon in 'Takip Disi' tab re-includes product
UI: Re-included product removed from 'Takip Disi' tab
UI: All filter tabs work: Tumu, Eslesmis, Eslesmemis, Rakip Daha Ucuz, Biz Daha Ucuz, Takip Disi
seed_data_creation: None - test products excluded and re-included during testing (cleanup performed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 features fully tested and working: (1) Category filter dropdown on Price Tracking page with 'Tum Kategoriler', '600 Seri' (27 products), '900 Seri' (110 products). (2) Individual product exclusion via Eye/EyeOff icon - PUT /api/products/{slug}/exclude-tracking toggles excluded_from_tracking field. Excluded products appear in 'Takip Disi' tab and are hidden from normal list. (3) Free-first scraping strategy: akakce_request tries curl_cffi direct (free), then httpx (free), then ScraperAPI (paid fallback). search_akakce_via_google tries free Google search first, then ScraperAPI SERP as fallback. All existing filter tabs still work: Tumu, Eslesmis, Eslesmemis, Rakip Daha Ucuz, Biz Daha Ucuz.
